name: Love Me Actually
overview: The recent trend of people in their 20~30s is to go on a trip with a 'trip mate'. Through various social network communities and apps, it is possible to find the right 'trip mate' and go on a trip that can advance into something more than just friends. 4 comedians and 4 women go on a trip around Korea to see if this adventure can venture into something more.

trailers.title: [1차 티저] '호구의 연애' 설레고 웃긴 여행 동호회가 온다! 회원 대모집!
